allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in 5174,8787\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Output "dev servers stopped")
